login.title: Sign in
login.welcomeBackDesc: You have been signed in successfully.
login.signInToAccount: Sign in to your HUZILERZ account

signup.title: Create account
signup.successDesc: Welcome to HUZILERZ. Please verify your email to get started.
signup.joinHuzilerz: Join HUZILERZ and start building your workspace

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Update your personal information and preferences
profile.failed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
profile.usernameDesc: This will be your unique identifier across the platform
profile.emailDesc: Email cannot be changed from this page
profile.securityNotificationsDesc: Receive notifications about security events and login attempts

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.description: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account
avatar.dropzone: Drop your image here, or click to browse
avatar.validTypes: JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF up to {size}MB
avatar.invalidType: Please upload a valid image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF)
avatar.tooLarge: File size must be less than {size}MB
avatar.failed: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.

email.title: Email Verification
email.description: Verify your email address to secure your account
email.label: Email

phone.title: Phone Verification
phone.description: Verify your phone number to secure your account
phone.label: Phone

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.sentInstructions: We've sent password reset instructions to
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.

verifyPage.title: Verify Your Account
verifyPage.description: Complete verification to secure your account

oauth2.processingDesc: Please wait while we finish setting up your account.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
validation.firstNameMax: First name must be less than 30 characters
validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be less than 30 characters
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.passwordUpper: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLower: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
validation.acceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameMax: Username must be less than 20 characters
validation.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
validation.bioMax: Bio must be less than 500 characters

guards.needRolePermissions: You need {role} permissions to access this resource.
guards.noRequiredPermissions: You don't have the required permissions to access this resource.
guards.noPermission: You don't have permission to access this resource.

errorBoundary.title: Authentication Error
errorBoundary.defaultMessage: Something went wrong with authentication. Please try again.

pricing.title: Choose Your Perfect Plan
pricing.description: Flexible pricing with Mobile Money payment to grow your business
pricing.error: Failed to load pricing plans. Please try again later.

footer.securePayment: Secure payment via MTN Mobile Money, Orange Money, and Fapshi

downgrade.title: Schedule Downgrade
downgrade.description: You are about to schedule a downgrade from {currentPlan} to {planName}.
downgrade.alert: Your current plan features will remain active until {date}. After this date, your plan will automatically switch to {planName}.

discount.title: Save 15% with yearly billing
discount.description: Choose any yearly plan and get 2 months free. Pay once, save more.
discount.paymentNote: Payable with MTN Mobile Money, Orange Money, or Fapshi

checkout.title: Complete Your Subscription
checkout.subtitle: {planName} - {cycle} billing
checkout.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
checkout.failedToPrepare: Failed to prepare checkout. Please try again.

introAlreadyUsed.title: Intro discount already used
introAlreadyUsed.description: Your introductory discount can only be used once. Regular pricing will apply.

wizard.phoneInvalid: Invalid phone number format. Use Cameroonian number (e.g., 670123456)
wizard.loginRequired: You must be logged in to subscribe

selector.label: Select provider
selector.error: Failed to load payment methods. Please refresh the page.
selector.noMethods: No payment methods available. Please contact support.

processor.instructions: Please complete the payment on your mobile device
processor.prompt: Check your phone for the payment prompt
processor.step1: 1. Check your phone for the payment prompt
processor.step2: 2. Enter your Mobile Money PIN to approve
processor.step3: 3. Wait for confirmation (this may take up to 2 minutes)

page.title: Browse all themes
page.notFoundDesc: The theme you're looking for doesn't exist.

placeholders.relatedThemesDesc: We'll soon show themes similar to this one based on category and features.
placeholders.reviewsDesc: We're working on adding a review system for themes. Stay tuned for user ratings and feedback!

empty.title: No themes found
empty.matchFilters: No themes match your current filters. Try adjusting your search criteria.
empty.unavailable: No themes are currently available. Check back soon!

modal.description: Choose which workspace you'd like to use <theme>{themeName}</theme> in.
modal.failed: Failed to add theme. Please try again.
